question_text: On a scale of 1 to 5, with 1 being 'not at all' and 5 being 'extremely,' how much does your favorite food bring you comfort?
Describe a memorable experience you had while eating your favorite food.
If you could only eat your favorite food for the rest of your life, would you? Why or why not?
What is your favorite restaurant that serves your favorite food?
Are there any negative aspects to your favorite food?
How would you improve your favorite food?
